scripts.deploy:d1: pnpm build:web && cd apps/worker-d1 && wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:kv: pnpm build:web && cd apps/worker-kv && wrangler deploy
scripts.deploy:angular-d1: pnpm build:angular && cd apps/web-angular && wrangler deploy
scripts.migrate:d1: cd apps/worker-d1 && wrangler d1 migrations apply chat-d1-db
